fields.helpText: This is the unique message ID generated by the VistA HL7 package.
This is the date (date.time) that this record was created.

ADD - a new record to be added to an external database   DELETE - delete an existing record in an external database   UPDATE - update data for an existing record previously transmitted to an  external database.  Not used at this time.  No record will be edited.  If  the user edits a record in one of the files, then the original record in  that file will be deleted, and a new record will be added to this file.   This two messages will be sent to the external database, a delete event,  then an add
This is the date (or date.time) that this HL7 message was served to the external database.
This is the status of this transmission event.

This transaction ID will be computer generated by the Taskman batch job  that will generate the HL7 messages.  The format of the transaction id  is: <site number>-<single character code>-number   where   <single character code> must be T or F for the location of the data                          (from the transaction file or the fee basis file)   <number> is the ien from the transaction file or the fee basis file
Enter the file 228.2 record number if it is the source of the data for  this HL7 message.
Enter the file 228.5 record number if it is the source of the data for  this HL7 message.
If the HL7 message is an application ack receipt from the remote  database, then indicate the remote database responsible.   AAC = Austin Automation Center   HDR = Health Data Repository

If this is an original HL7 message served out to a remote database (e.g.,  AAC or HDR), then this pointer value should just be itself.  If the HL7  message type is an application acknowledgement, then this pointer should  be to the original DES/HL7 TRANSMISSION record to which the ack belongs.
